CustomObject.description:
This Custom Metadata defines the tasks included in the Road to Market process. It allows administrators to structure and organize tasks by team, define their execution order, and prepopulate task-related fields.
The Road to Market is automatically generated when a new project is created and becomes visible once the Road to Market Activated checkbox is selected in a PMT project. This configuration ensures consistent task management and streamlined coordination across teams throughout the project lifecycle.
CustomObject.label: PMT - Road to market task
